titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Don Bachardy Artwork, 1996.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2003 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Print of portrait of Evelyn Hooker, Ph.D., by Don Bachardy.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Don Bachardy was life-partner of author Christopher Isherwood, also a close friend of Evelyn Hooker, subject of this print.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Print of portrait of Evelyn Hooker, Ph.D., by Don Bachardy.

did.unittitle: Print of portrait of Evelyn Hooker, Ph.D., by Don Bachardy.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Don Bachardy artwork, #7704. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
